name: Winston Lin
title: AI, software, and business systems
tagline: I'm Winston Lin. I work on serverless, platform products, and operating models. This site is a small set of case studies, essays, and Python tools.
meta_description: Selected case studies, essays, and Python tools across serverless, platform products, and business systems.
intro_paragraphs: I’ve led product across serverless, CI/CD, and developer platforms, and I also work with operators on growth, service design, and business systems.
experience_highlights: Principal Product Manager for OCI Functions, focused on developer experience and execution model
Previously led product work across OCI DevOps / CI/CD and adjacent platform systems
Built internal platform capabilities that shortened delivery cycles and reduced operational drag
